headlines.headline: 2026 NBA buzz: Latest news, injuries, league intel, live updates
headlines.description: We're tracking the latest news, rumors and buzz across the NBA, including what we're hearing ahead of free agency and which players could be traded.

headlines.headline: 2026 NBA free agency: Grades for offseason signings, extensions
headlines.description: We're grading the biggest NBA free agent signings and extensions, including Andrew Wiggins' new three-year deal with the Heat.

headlines.headline: Heat, Andrew Wiggins reach 3-year, $64M deal, sources say
headlines.description: Heat forward Andrew Wiggins intends to sign a three-year, $64 million contract to stay with the franchise, sources told ESPN.

headlines.headline: 'The Hoop Collective': Episodes of Brian Windhorst's NBA podcast
headlines.description: Here are the top highlights from Brian Windhorst's "The Hoop Collective" podcast, from breaking news to the latest intel and reaction from around the NBA.

headlines.headline: Fantasy basketball: Miles Bridges trade opens the door in Charlotte
headlines.description: Andre Snellings and Eric Moody break down the fantasy impact of the latest offseason moves from around the NBA.

headlines.headline: Sources: Deandre Ayton picks up Lakers option, Marcus Smart opts out
headlines.description: Lakers center Deandre Ayton is opting into his $8.1 million player option for the 2026-27 season, while Marcus Smart is declining his $5.4 million option, sources told ESPN's Shams Charania.

headlines.headline: Lions CB Terrion Arnold's bond set at $1M with conditions
headlines.description: A judge found probable cause for Terrion Arnold to face charges of armed robbery and kidnapping but denied prosecutors' motion for the Detroit Lions cornerback to be held without bond Monday.

headlines.headline: Fantasy football buzz: Why Rashid Shaheed is on breakout watch for 2026
headlines.description: Eric Karabell breaks down how the Seahawks WR is poised for an elevated role in 2026 after a strong spring.

headlines.headline: Will the Steelers win more games than the Cowboys?
headlines.description: Will the Steelers win more games than the Cowboys?

headlines.headline: Former NFL RB Chris Johnson shares his ALS diagnosis: 'I chose to fight'
headlines.description: Former NFL RB Chris Johnson shares his ALS diagnosis: 'I chose to fight'

headlines.headline: Wimbledon's strawberries and cream leads sports world's signature food, drink staples
headlines.description: The refreshing concoction is an All England Lawn Tennis and Croquet Club staple, but Wimbledon isn't the only event associated with a signature food or beverage item.

headlines.headline: Former NFL RB Chris Johnson discusses ALS diagnosis
headlines.description: Former Titans and Cardinals running back Chris Johnson told "Good Morning America" that he was diagnosed with ALS in 2025.

headlines.headline: Sabres re-sign Beck Malenstyn to a six-year, $17.5M contract
headlines.description: The Buffalo Sabres re-signed checking-line forward Beck Malenstyn to a six-year, $17.5 million contract on Monday, two days before free agency opens.

headlines.headline: NHL free agency 2026: How all 32 teams can earn an A+
headlines.description: With the market set to open July 1, we identify key free agents for each team and what those teams should do.

headlines.headline: Predators sign faceoff ace Jack Drury to 5-year, $22.5M deal
headlines.description: The Predators signed forward Jack Drury to a five-year, $22.5 million contract on Sunday night, four days after he was acquired from the Avalanche.

headlines.headline: 2026 NHL draft grades: Best, worst, most surprising picks
headlines.description: Which teams added the most value this weekend? Who whiffed badly? We grade all 32 here.

headlines.headline: 7-foot-1 Alexander Karmanov tallest player drafted in NHL
headlines.description: The Sharks selected 7-foot-1 defenseman Alexander Karmanov, making the 18-year-old the tallest player ever drafted by an NHL team.

headlines.headline: Which 2026 NHL draft picks should I have on my fantasy hockey team?
headlines.description: Which top picks from the 2026 NHL draft should you draft for next season's fantasy hockey teams?
